name: Toolbar
description: Horizontal row of action controls for text formatting, editor operations, and grouped contextual actions. Supports floating (default) and sticky surface treatments.

props.name: sticky
props.description: Sticky mode — flat, no radius, no shadow

states.rationale: The Toolbar root is a static surface with no interactive states of its own. Interactive states (hover/pressed/focus) live on the Ghost Buttons composed inside, which use overlay tokens. The toolbar repaints a subtle background on child buttons that carry data-active.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to next control inside the toolbar
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus to previous control inside the toolbar

accessibility.focusManagement: Natural tab order across child buttons. Toggle buttons expose aria-pressed; consumers may add a roving tabindex pattern via the Button children if richer keyboard navigation is needed.

valueMapping.true: attach a DropdownOptions wrapping the trailing Ellipsis button

propertyMapping.note: Figma-only structural toggle. In code, consumers attach a DropdownOptions (or any other dropdown) as the final child of <Toolbar>. The MessageComposer convention is a Pin/Unpin menu — Pin → render the Toolbar in the sticky slot; Unpin → render in the selection-aware floatingToolbar slot.

useWhen: Text formatting controls in a rich-text editor (bold, italic, underline, alignment, lists, link)
Floating toolbar that appears after a text selection
Editor / canvas toolbar (movable, sticky, or floating)
Grouped icon-button actions that share a single labeled surface
doNotUseFor: Page-level primary navigation → use Sidebar or TopBar
A single action → use Button directly
Dropdown menus → use Dropdown (Toolbar may contain a trigger that opens a Dropdown for overflow actions)

knownDeviations.description: Active-button background uses the L2 token --dls-color-intent-neutral-subtle directly. A dedicated L4 token (e.g. --dls-color-component-toolbar-button-bg-active) would be preferable; deferred until a Toolbar token group is added to tokens.json.
